creator_profile.name: Seth Godin

audience_size_documented.blog_readers: 1M+ daily readers (per sethgodin.com and TED speaker bio)
audience_size_documented.email_newsletter: [uncertain] Exact subscriber count not publicly disclosed; blog posts auto-delivered to all subscribers via email
audience_size_documented.LinkedIn: ~265.9K followers (April 2026, via onelittleweb.com digital marketing experts compilation)
audience_size_documented.X_Twitter: ~723.5K–772.6K followers (April 2026, via x.com/@ThisIsSethsBlog and SPEAKRJ analytics)
audience_size_documented.YouTube: [uncertain] Reported figures vary: ~732.3K (peopleai.com) vs ~7.3K (other sources); likely multiple channels or discrepancy in data
audience_size_documented.TED_talks: Five TED talks, two ranking among the most popular of all time (per TED.com speaker bio)

creator_profile.tier_justification: Seth Godin is one of the most influential marketing thinkers of the digital age, with 21 best-selling books, 1M+ daily blog readers, 5 TED talks (two among the most popular ever), and a combined social following of ~1M+ across LinkedIn and X. While his social media following is smaller than mainstream influencers (he notably avoids Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok), his intellectual authority and influence in marketing/business circles is outsized. His AI chatbot is pioneering in the 'train on your entire body of work' approach, making him a Tier B thought leader with disproportionate cultural influence.

bot_identity.bot_name: Seth's Blog Bot (also referred to as 'Ask an AI trained on Seth's writing')
bot_identity.positioning_tagline: Ask an AI trained on Seth's writing
positioning_narrative_excerpts: Here's an experimental AI chat bot that has been trained on all 5,000,000 words of my blog. You can ask it questions about anything I've blogged and it may do a good job of answering.
Dave Winer pursued the idea in parallel. I expect these sorts of bots will become ubiquitous.

It is the single best use case I've seen of ChatGPT — or whatever they are using — being implemented in a way where it's not just a talking llama. (Seth Godin on Tim Ferriss podcast, discussing Automattic's AI plugin and his blog's AI search)
bot_identity.launch_date: 2023-03-29 (announced in blog post 'Opening the pod bay door')
bot_identity.current_status: Active (accessible at seths.blog/bot/ as of April 2026)

primary_jtbds: ask_my_method - Ask questions grounded in Seth's 25+ years of daily blog writing on marketing, leadership, tribes, permission marketing, and the connection economy
fan_qa - Interact with Seth Godin's ideas conversationally without reading through 8,000+ blog posts
content_discovery - Bot provides links to relevant blog articles and summarizes their content, serving as an intelligent search engine for Seth's blog archive
secondary_jtbds: thought_leadership_amplification - Demonstrates Seth's forward-thinking approach to AI and content, reinforcing his brand as a marketing innovator
audience_engagement - Adds an interactive element to the blog that deepens reader engagement beyond passive consumption
jobs_to_be_done.jtbd_evidence_source: Stated (from Seth Godin's blog posts 'Opening the pod bay door' March 2023 and 'ChatGPT for you' September 2023, and Chat Thing platform listing)

functionality.memory_persistence: [uncertain] Not publicly documented; Chat Thing platform does support chat sessions but persistence across sessions unclear
functionality.tool_integrations: Embedded on seths.blog via Chat Thing iframe/widget. Also available directly on chatthing.ai. Dexa.ai separately indexes Akimbo podcast episodes for AI Q&A.
functionality.knowledge_grounding_claimed: Trained on all 5,000,000+ words of Seth's Blog (8,000+ posts spanning 25+ years). John Ward and other users report the bot also appears to include content from Seth's marketing books, though this is not explicitly confirmed by Seth himself. The bot provides links to relevant source articles alongside its answers.
functionality.moderation_disclaimers: Described as 'experimental' by Seth Godin. Users can rate responses using thumbs up/thumbs down feedback mechanism. Standard cookie policy and GDPR compliance via seths.blog privacy policy.
functionality.human_handoff: None documented. The bot operates as a self-service tool with no escalation path to Seth or his team.
functionality.platform_infrastructure: Built on Chat Thing (chatthing.ai), a platform by Pixelhop that creates custom ChatGPT bots using user-provided content. Chat Thing uses OpenAI's GPT models under the hood. Seth Godin was one of Chat Thing's first paying customers, and his blog was the largest bot created on the platform at the time. Seth also hinted at testing Automattic's (WordPress parent company) 'top-secret AI plugin' on the Tim Ferriss podcast, suggesting possible WordPress-native AI integration for blog search.
functionality.voice_modality_details: No voice modality. Text-only chat interface. Dexa.ai separately offers audio clip retrieval from Akimbo podcast but that is a separate product.
functionality.ai_agent_capabilities: Q&A chatbot only. No autonomous actions, no booking, no CRM integration, no workflow execution. Generates text responses grounded in Seth's blog content and provides links to relevant source articles.

distribution.access_url: https://seths.blog/bot/ (primary), https://chatthing.ai/bots/ffc94727-3c06-4ada-8ba2-6c0aab35f51b (Chat Thing direct link), https://dexa.ai/akimbo (Dexa.ai Akimbo podcast bot)
distribution.distribution_path_description: Blog readers discover the bot directly on seths.blog via the 'Ask' button on the homepage or the /bot/ page. Seth announced it via his daily blog post on March 29, 2023 ('Opening the pod bay door'). No aggressive social media promotion funnel — distribution is organic through the blog itself and word-of-mouth. Dexa.ai separately makes Akimbo podcast content searchable via AI.
distribution.link_in_bio_platform: None — Seth Godin does not use Instagram, Facebook, or TikTok and does not employ a link-in-bio strategy. His blog (seths.blog) is his primary distribution hub.
distribution.social_to_bot_funnel: Minimal. Seth's X/Twitter account (@ThisIsSethsBlog) auto-publishes blog posts but does not actively promote the bot. LinkedIn posts occasionally reference the blog. Primary discovery is through direct blog readership and word-of-mouth sharing.

monetization.public_price: Free — no cost to use the bot at seths.blog/bot/
monetization.bundled_with: None — the bot is a standalone free feature on Seth's blog. Not bundled with any course, membership, or paid product.
monetization.monetization_linkage_type: brand_building — The bot serves as a demonstration of Seth's thought leadership and forward-thinking approach to AI. It reinforces his brand as an innovator and keeps readers engaged with his blog content. No direct revenue generation from the bot itself.
monetization.list_building_integration: Indirect — seths.blog has a prominent email subscription CTA (seths.blog/subscribe/) but the bot itself does not gate content behind email capture or require signup.

revenue_model_detail.bot_revenue: None — completely free with no paywall, no premium tier, no upsell
revenue_model_detail.broader_revenue_context: Seth Godin monetizes through book sales (21 best-sellers), speaking engagements (named one of the top 21 speakers for the 21st century), online courses and workshops (The Marketing Seminar, altMBA, The Freelancer's Workshop via Akimbo), and consulting. The bot supports these revenue streams indirectly by deepening audience engagement with his ideas.
revenue_model_detail.philosophy: Consistent with Seth's 'permission marketing' and 'free content as a gift' philosophy — the bot is offered freely as a way to make his body of work more accessible and useful

content_training.content_training_corpus: All 5,000,000+ words from Seth's Blog (seths.blog), spanning 8,000+ daily posts over 25+ years. Likely also includes content from some of his 21 published books (per user reports, though not explicitly confirmed by Seth). The Chat Thing platform ingests content via site crawling and RSS feed to keep the index fresh. Dexa.ai separately indexes all episodes of the Akimbo podcast (363 episodes, 8 seasons).
content_training.update_frequency: [uncertain] Chat Thing supports RSS-based content updates, suggesting new blog posts may be automatically indexed. However, specific refresh cadence is not publicly documented. Seth publishes a new blog post every single day, so the corpus grows daily.

risks_guardrails.stated_disclaimers: Seth describes the bot as 'experimental' in his launch post. The bot page includes standard cookie policy and privacy disclosures. No specific AI-related disclaimers about accuracy or limitations are prominently displayed beyond the 'experimental' framing.
risks_guardrails.data_use_policy_cited: seths.blog/privacypolicy/ — Standard website privacy policy. GDPR-compliant per European privacy regulation. Cookie policy disclosed. No specific AI/chatbot data use policy documented separately.
risks_guardrails.minors_policy: [uncertain] No specific minors policy documented for the chatbot.
risks_guardrails.impersonation_safeguards: The bot is positioned as 'an AI trained on Seth's writing' rather than as Seth himself. The framing 'Ask an AI trained on Seth's writing' creates a clear distinction between the bot and Seth Godin the person. Users can provide feedback via thumbs up/down on responses.
risks_guardrails.regulatory_compliance_status: [uncertain] No public statements found regarding FTC disclosure, state AI laws, or specific regulatory compliance for the chatbot beyond standard GDPR website compliance.

competitive.competitive_moat_type: Unique content corpus (5M+ words from 25+ years of daily blogging is one of the largest single-author content corpuses used for an AI chatbot), brand authority (Seth Godin is arguably the most recognized name in modern marketing thought leadership), first-mover advantage (launched March 2023, among the earliest creator-specific AI chatbots), philosophy alignment (the free, accessible bot embodies Seth's own 'permission marketing' and 'generous content' philosophy, making it an authentic extension of his brand).
competitive.meta_creator_ai_status: No evidence of participation in Meta's Creator AI program. Seth Godin does not use Instagram or Facebook actively and has publicly critiqued social media platforms, making Meta AI participation unlikely.
competitive.engagement_metrics_public: [uncertain] No publicly disclosed engagement metrics (MAU, messages per session, retention) for the chatbot. User reviews on third-party sites (TAAFT, AI Finder, Success.ai) exist but no quantitative usage data is available.
